page: Microsoft Azure E8-4ads_v7 is an x86_64 architecture virtual machine belonging to the Eadsv7 server family. It is powered by an AMD processor and runs on the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor. This instance features 4 dedicated virtual CPUs and is equipped with 64.0 GB of system memory, yielding a high memory-to-core ratio of 16.0 GB per vCPU.

For storage requirements, the server includes 472 GB of local disk storage and is premium storage capable, allowing for high-performance disk configurations. It does not include any complimentary public IPv4 addresses and does not feature any graphics processing units.

From a cost-efficiency perspective, the high memory density of 16.0 GB per vCPU makes this instance suitable for memory-intensive workloads without the need to provision excess compute resources. This resource profile is designed for workloads such as relational databases, in-memory caches, and data analytics pipelines that require substantial memory capacity relative to processing cores.
description: Microsoft Azure E8-4ads_v7 is an x86_64 memory-optimized virtual machine from the Eadsv7 family, running on the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor. Powered by an AMD processor, it features 4 dedicated vCPUs and 64.0 GB of system memory, providing a high ratio of 16.0 GB of RAM per core. The instance includes 472 GB of local disk storage and supports premium storage configurations, though it lacks integrated GPUs and complimentary public IPv4 addresses. This hardware profile is qualitatively cost-efficient for memory-heavy operations, allowing users to access substantial memory capacity without paying for unneeded compute cores. It is suited for workloads such as database hosting, in-memory caching, and data processing tasks.

tagline: A memory-optimized virtual machine featuring a high memory-to-core ratio and bundled local storage for data-intensive workloads.
